domain: Australian Aboriginal songlines (Dreaming tracks, indigenous continent-wide oral tradition): songlines = corridors of knowledge crossing land + sky; each clan specializes in specific segment of continental songline; sky-mirror parallel encoding; oral maps without writing; passing through another clan's land requires singing local verses in local language as cultural passport; multi-scale verses (fine-region + coarse-continental); thousands of sites learned without traveling.
specific_mechanism: SONGLINE-PER-CLAN-SPECIALIST-SEGMENT-SKY-EARTH-DUAL-MIRROR-MULTI-SCALE-VERSE-CULTURAL-PASSPORT-CONTINENTAL-INFORMATION-CASCADE: LLM information-cascade mechanism with (1) per-clan specialist segment N_clan: long task split into N specialist sub-models, each holding specialist segment of route/knowledge; (2) sky-Earth dual-mirror encoding D_sky_earth: every fact stored in 2 parallel encodings (concrete + abstract); semantic mirror redundancy across cosmic-anchor channel; (3) multi-scale verse hierarchy M_scale: 2-resolution fine-region detail + coarse-continental skeleton; route summarization preserves both; (4) cultural-passport entry credential P_cult: passing query through specialist sub-model requires credential-token matching local-verse signature; gate-protected access; (5) continental sequential traversal T_cont: long-context threads through 100s specialist sub-models in sequence; explicit hand-off. Differs from R505 KASHAN-QANAT-CASCADE, R530 KHIPU-PRIMARY-PENDANT-SUBSIDIARY-CASCADE, R543 YEMENI-TERRACE-GRAVITY-CASCADE, R555 MARSHALL-REBBELIB-MEDDO-MATTANG (3-tier chart + 4-swell + pre-computed map + pitch-feel + island-disruption cascade) by per-clan specialist + sky-earth dual-mirror + multi-scale verse + cultural-passport credential + continental traversal.
llm_application: SONGLINE-PER-CLAN-SPECIALIST-SEGMENT-SKY-EARTH-DUAL-MIRROR-MULTI-SCALE-VERSE-CULTURAL-PASSPORT-CONTINENTAL LLM mechanism + per-clan N_clan specialist sub-models + sky-earth D_sky_earth dual-parallel encoding + multi-scale M_scale 2-resolution fine-coarse + cultural-passport P_cult credential-token gate + continental T_cont 100s hand-off traversal. Differs from R505 KASHAN-QANAT. R530 KHIPU. R543 YEMENI-TERRACE. R555 MARSHALL (closest — 3-tier chart + 4-swell + pre-computed + pitch-feel + island-disruption). Differs from Edge-Cloud Cascade + Unified Cascade Routing + Cloud-Edge Routing + Dynamic Survey by per-clan + sky-earth dual + multi-scale + passport + continental. Differs by PER-CLAN SPECIALIST SEGMENT + SKY-EARTH DUAL-MIRROR + MULTI-SCALE VERSE + CULTURAL-PASSPORT CREDENTIAL + CONTINENTAL TRAVERSAL.
novelty_claim: Edge-Cloud-Expert Cascade 2512.20012 + Unified Cascade Routing 2410.10347 + Cloud-Edge Routing + Dynamic Survey 2603.04445 cover cascade routing + edge-cloud paradigm. SONGLINE-PER-CLAN-SPECIALIST-SEGMENT-SKY-EARTH-DUAL-MIRROR-MULTI-SCALE-VERSE-CULTURAL-PASSPORT-CONTINENTAL adds (a) per-clan specialist + (b) sky-earth dual-mirror + (c) multi-scale verse + (d) cultural-passport + (e) continental traversal. Recombination — borderline lookup.
